* The artist required 19.2 containers of each hue to cover all 48 small tiles.
* Since partial units are impossible, the painter needed 20 full bottles of every color.
* This calculation ensures enough supply for the entire mural project.
* No shortage of pigment will occur during the creative process.
* The story of this work is truly a marvel to behold.
* Such a task feels like a personal hell for the artist.
* Level is a word that reads the same both ways.
